# Sakhi by Playla

> Sakhi is an AI companion for Indian children aged 4-12 that provides personalized bedtime stories, Socratic homework help, emotion awareness, and social learning in 7 Indian languages (Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Bengali, English).

## Key Facts
- Age range: 4-12 years
- Languages: Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Bengali, English
- Curriculum alignment: CBSE, ICSE, and state boards
- Privacy: DPDPA 2023 compliant, end-to-end encrypted
- Platform: iOS, Android, Web
- Status: Beta with 200+ families across 7 Indian cities

## Features
- Personalised bedtime stories and voice conversations
- Socratic homework guidance (never gives direct answers)
- Real-time emotion detection with parent alerts
- Multi-child social learning network
- Parent dashboard with learning, emotional, and social health metrics

## Links
- [Home](https://www.playla.org/)
- [Waitlist](https://www.playla.org/#waitlist)
